name: Zhoug
recipeIngredient: 1 cup chopped parsley (including stems), about half a bunch
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree the chili peppers in a blender until they measure one cup.
2. In the same blender, puree the parsley and cilantro together with the blended chili peppers.
3. Add the minced garlic, salt, ground cumin, and olive oil to the blender. Blend everything well.
4. Store the zhoug refrigerated. It will remain fresh for many months.
Yield: 1½ cups.
